title: Sleep Wellness Specialist
body: Focuses on sleep wellness and stress reduction through evidence-based lifestyle protocols and personalised care plans.

title: Evening Sleep Routine
body: Wellness-focused nighttime routine for better sleep habits. Includes wind-down practices, screen time limits, and breathwork techniques.

title: Functional Medicine Sleep Specialist
body: Specialises in identifying root causes of sleep disruption through functional testing, gut-brain axis assessment, and personalised wellness protocols.

title: Morning Light Exposure Protocol
body: A structured morning routine using natural light exposure to regulate circadian rhythm and improve nighttime sleep quality and consistency.

title: My Sleep Journey — 3 Months In
body: After following the evening routine protocol consistently for 3 months, I noticed significant improvement in sleep onset time and morning energy. Happy to share specifics with anyone trying something similar.

title: Anyone else use journaling for sleep anxiety?
body: Started doing a 10-minute brain dump before bed to clear racing thoughts. Has made a noticeable difference for me. Would love to hear what others are doing.

title: Magnesium Dosage for Sleep — Experiences?
body: Looking for community experiences with magnesium supplementation for sleep. Specifically interested in glycinate vs threonate. Please note any dosage discussions are personal experiences, not medical advice.

title: Stress Recovery Wellness Protocol
body: Structured stress management practices focused on sleep hygiene, mindfulness, hydration, and recovery routines.

title: Managing Anxiety Without Screens Before Bed
body: Community discussion about reducing nighttime anxiety through screen reduction and evening mindfulness routines.

title: Integrative Stress Wellness Coach
body: Supports clients experiencing burnout, fatigue, and chronic stress through holistic lifestyle planning and recovery-focused wellness strategies.

title: Experiences With Supplement Stacking
body: Users discuss combining magnesium, melatonin, and herbal supplements for sleep support. Experiences shared are personal only and should not replace practitioner guidance.

title: Post-Surgery Recovery Support Protocol
body: Wellness-focused recovery support involving hydration, sleep routines, gentle movement, and practitioner follow-up during recovery periods.

title: Alternative Wellness Discussions Around Fenbendazole
body: Community members discuss alternative wellness conversations involving fenbendazole and cancer-related experiences. Posts are informational only and do not replace professional medical guidance.

title: Integrative Oncology Wellness Practitioner
body: Provides supportive wellness guidance for individuals navigating cancer recovery, stress reduction, sleep support, and lifestyle balance alongside professional medical care.
